title: OJS Webhook Subscription
description: Schema for OJS webhook subscriptions. Webhooks enable external systems to receive HTTP POST notifications when job lifecycle events occur. Deliveries are signed with HMAC-SHA256 for authenticity verification.

id.title: Subscription ID
id.description: Unique identifier for this subscription. System-generated.

url.title: Endpoint URL
url.description: The URL to deliver webhook events to. MUST use HTTPS in production environments.

events.title: Event Types
events.description: List of event types to deliver. Supports the '*' wildcard to subscribe to all events.

active.title: Active
active.description: Whether this subscription is active. Inactive subscriptions do not receive deliveries.

secret.title: Signing Secret
secret.description: HMAC-SHA256 signing secret. Returned only at creation time. Use to verify delivery authenticity.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata for this subscription.

filter.title: Event Filter
filter.description: Optional filters to narrow which events are delivered.

queues.title: Queue Filter
queues.description: Only deliver events for jobs in these queues.

job_types.title: Job Type Filter
job_types.description: Only deliver events for these job types.

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: Timestamp when this subscription was created.

webhookDelivery.title: Webhook Delivery
webhookDelivery.description: The payload delivered to a webhook endpoint via HTTP POST.

event_type.title: Event Type
event_type.description: The type of event that triggered this delivery.

delivery_id.title: Delivery ID
delivery_id.description: Unique identifier for this delivery attempt.

subscription_id.title: Subscription ID
subscription_id.description: The subscription that triggered this delivery.

timestamp.title: Timestamp
timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the delivery was initiated.

data.title: Event Data
data.description: The event payload containing job or workflow details.

deliveryHeaders.title: Webhook Delivery Headers
deliveryHeaders.description: HTTP headers included in every webhook delivery.

X-OJS-Signature.title: Signature Header
X-OJS-Signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature in the format sha256=<hex>. Computed as HMAC-SHA256(secret, timestamp + '.' + body).
